enums.doc: SType values for wgpu-native extension structs (0x0003XXXX range).

entries.doc: Allows the use of immediate data in render/compute passes.

entries.doc: Allows a buffer containing the actual number of draw calls.
entries.name: multi_draw_indirect_count

entries.doc: Enables bindings of writable storage buffers and textures visible to vertex shaders.
entries.name: vertex_writable_storage

entries.doc: Allows uniform arrays of textures in shaders.
entries.name: texture_binding_array

entries.doc: Allows non-uniform indexing of sampled texture and storage buffer arrays.
entries.name: sampled_texture_and_storage_buffer_array_non_uniform_indexing

entries.doc: Allows uniform arrays of storage buffers or textures.
entries.name: storage_resource_binding_array

entries.doc: Allows bind groups with fewer bindings than required.
entries.name: partially_bound_binding_array

entries.doc: Removes WebGPU restriction on MAP_READ/MAP_WRITE pairing.
entries.name: mappable_primary_buffers

entries.doc: Allows arrays of buffers in shaders.
entries.name: buffer_binding_array

entries.doc: Allows non-uniform indexing of storage texture arrays.
entries.name: storage_texture_array_non_uniform_indexing

entries.doc: Enables clear to zero for textures.
entries.name: clear_texture

entries.doc: Enables 64-bit floating point in SPIR-V shaders.
entries.name: shader_f64

entries.doc: Allows i16 in shaders (SPIR-V passthrough only).
entries.name: shader_i16

entries.doc: Allows subgroup operations in compute/fragment shaders.
entries.name: subgroup

entries.doc: Allows subgroup operations in vertex shaders.
entries.name: subgroup_vertex

entries.doc: Allows subgroup barrier in compute shaders.
entries.name: subgroup_barrier

entries.doc: Allows timestamp queries on command encoders.
entries.name: timestamp_query_inside_encoders

entries.doc: Allows timestamp queries inside render/compute passes.
entries.name: timestamp_query_inside_passes

entries.doc: Allows i64 and u64 in shaders.
entries.name: shader_int64

entries.doc: Allows f32 atomic operations in shaders.
entries.name: shader_float32_atomic

entries.doc: Enables image atomic operations on R32Uint/Sint textures.
entries.name: texture_atomic

entries.doc: Allows i64/u64 atomic min and max.
entries.name: shader_int64_atomic_min_max

entries.doc: Enables R64Uint image atomic min and max.
entries.name: texture_int64_atomic

entries.doc: Enables multiview with partial layer rendering.
entries.name: selective_multiview

entries.doc: Allows arrays of acceleration structures in shaders.
entries.name: acceleration_structure_binding_array

entries.doc: Enables @coherent memory decoration on storage buffers.
entries.name: memory_decoration_coherent

entries.doc: Enables @volatile memory decoration on storage buffers.
entries.name: memory_decoration_volatile

entries.doc: Errors, warnings, informational, and debug messages.
entries.name: debug

entries.doc: All messages, including very verbose trace-level output.
entries.name: trace

entries.doc: Use FXC (D3DCompile). Old and slow but requires no additional DLLs.
entries.name: fxc

entries.doc: Use DXC (DirectX Shader Compiler). Requires dxcompiler.dll.

enums.doc: Selects the OpenGL ES 3 minor version to request.

entries.doc: Automatically select the best available version.
entries.name: automatic

entries.doc: Number of clipper invocations (triangles output by vertex shader).
entries.name: clipper_invocations

entries.doc: Number of primitives not culled by the clipper.
entries.name: clipper_primitives_out

enums.doc: Maximum HLSL shader model version for DXC.
enums.name: dxc_max_shader_model

entries.doc: DXGI swapchain from HWND. No transparency, better tooling support.

entries.doc: DXGI swapchain from DirectComposition visual. Supports transparency.

entries.name: point

bitflags.doc: Bitflags selecting which graphics backends the instance should enable.

bitflags.name: instance_flag

entries.doc: Generate debug information in shaders and objects.
entries.name: debug

entries.doc: Enable validation in the backend API.
entries.name: validation

entries.doc: Don't pass labels to the backend API.
entries.name: discard_hal_labels

entries.doc: Validate indirect buffer content prior to issuing draws/dispatches.
entries.name: validation_indirect_call

entries.doc: Use default flags for the current build configuration.
entries.name: default

entries.doc: Convenience alias enabling debug and validation.
entries.name: debugging

entries.doc: Convenience alias enabling debug, validation, and GPU-based validation.
entries.name: advanced_debugging

entries.doc: Modify flags based on environment variables.
entries.name: with_env

bitflags.doc: Describes how shader bound checks should be performed.
bitflags.name: shader_runtime_checks

entries.doc: Enforce bounds checks in shaders, even if the driver doesn't support it natively.
entries.name: bounds_checks

entries.doc: If not set, the caller must ensure shaders contain no infinite loops.
entries.name: force_loop_bounding

entries.doc: If not set, ray query functions must obey initialization rules.
entries.name: ray_query_initialization_tracking

entries.doc: If not set, task shaders won't validate mesh shader grid limits.
entries.name: task_shader_dispatch_tracking

entries.doc: If not set, mesh shaders won't clamp output vertex indices.
entries.name: mesh_shader_primitive_indices_clamp

methods.doc:
Enumerate available adapters.
If adapters is null, returns the count. Otherwise fills the array and returns the count.

returns.doc: True if the queue is empty.
